title: AI Fundamentals: From Zero to Confident
subtitle: The fundamentals every professional needs, without the hype.
heroHeading: Finally understand AI — without the hype, in one weekend
heroSubhead: Twelve short written lessons that take you from confused onlooker to confident user. No jargon. No fluff. Just the foundations that make everything else make sense.
whoItsFor: Non-technical professionals who feel left behind by AI
Business owners who want to use AI properly, not just dabble
Consultants and freelancers looking to build real AI skills
Readers — people who'd rather read a well-crafted lesson than watch a rambling video
whatYoullLearn: How AI actually works under the hood (plain English, no maths)
How to write prompts that produce good output
When to trust AI output and when to verify it
How to pick the right AI tool for the job
Privacy, hype, and the habits of professional AI users

modules.title: What AI actually is
modules.description: Build the mental model. What AI actually is, the family tree of terms you keep hearing, and where it's strong vs where it falls over.

lessons.title: What AI actually is, in one minute
The family tree of AI terms
What AI is good at vs terrible at

modules.title: How AI actually works
modules.description: Look under the bonnet. How LLMs predict words, what the context window actually does, and why most outputs feel generic — with the fix.

lessons.title: Why outputs feel generic — and the fix

modules.title: Working with AI well
modules.description: The patterns that separate skilled users from beginners. A clear prompting structure, when to trust the output, and the three habits that quietly waste hours.

lessons.title: When to trust AI output — and when not to
The 3 ways people waste time with AI

modules.title: Smart AI decisions
modules.description: Choose well, use safely. Picking the right model for the task, what never to paste into AI, and how to spot hype before it costs you.

lessons.title: Claude vs ChatGPT vs Gemini — which one, when?
Privacy, and what NOT to paste into AI
How to spot AI hype and misinformation

faqs.question: Who is this course for?
faqs.answer: Non-technical professionals, business owners, and consultants who want to understand AI properly without learning to code. If you've felt left behind by the hype, this is the start line.

faqs.question: Do I need any prior experience?
faqs.answer: None. We start from the ground up — no maths, no jargon, no prior tool experience required. If you've used a web browser, you're ready.

faqs.question: How is the course delivered?
faqs.answer: Text-first. Each lesson is a short, well-written page with a small interactive exercise inside it and a quick check at the end. No long video runtimes, no playback speed gymnastics.

faqs.question: How long do I have access?
faqs.answer: Lifetime access. You buy once and keep it. Future updates to the course are included at no extra cost.

faqs.question: Is there a certificate?
faqs.answer: Yes. Pass the final assessment with 70% or above and you'll get a verifiable certificate at a shareable URL (/certificate/[id]). The link works for anyone — no AICraft account required to verify it.

faqs.question: Can I get a refund?
faqs.answer: Yes. If the course isn't a fit within 14 days of purchase, email us and we'll refund you in full. No long forms.

faqs.question: Will I actually use this in my work?
faqs.answer: That's the whole point. Every lesson is built around a real situation — drafting, research, decision-making — not abstract theory.
